titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale College Commencement Orations and Poems
Yale College Commencement Orations and Poems
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday October 24, 2020 at 09:36

did.unittitle: Yale College commencement orations and poems
did.abstract: The records consist of orations and poems given at Yale commencement exercises.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 47 (YRG 47), Collections documenting teaching and learning in Yale academic programs.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale College Commencement Orations and Poems (RU 140). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of orations and poems given at Yale commencement exercises.

did.unittitle: Orations and poems
Unidentified
"A Dissertation on the Majesty of Divine Revelation and on the analogy between the doctrines of Christianity and the works of Nature"

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.
